query: Shein sustainable aviation fuel DHL GoGreen Plus partnership agreement

mako.raw:
{"query":"Shein sustainable aviation fuel DHL GoGreen Plus partnership agreement","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1625,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.dhl.com/id-en/home/press/press-archive/2026/dhl-express-and-shein-sign-gogreen-plus-agreement-to-advance-more-sustainable-logistics-in-cross-border-e-commerce.html","title":"DHL Express and SHEIN Sign GoGreen Plus Agreement to Advance More Sustainable Logistics in Cross-Border E-Commerce - DHL - Indonesia","content":"DHL Express, a business unit of DHL Group, and SHEIN, a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, today signed a GoGreen Plus agreement at the DHL Group's NOW & NEXT logistics summit in Shanghai.
In 2025, sustainable aviation fuel presents about 10% of overall fuel consumption in DHL’s dedicated air fleet , one of the highest rate among global airlines and a nearly tripled compared to 2024 (3.5%).
DHL NOW & NEXT in Shanghai is DHL’s flagship global logistics summit where industry leaders and supply chain experts gathered to discuss developments in global trade, supply chain resilience, and logistics innovation."},{"url":"https://www.sheingroup.com/newsroom/shein-expands-sustainable-aviation-fuel-pilot-initiatives-signs-agreement-with-dhl-for-gogreen","title":"SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service | SHEIN Group","content":"Building on an earlier Memorandum of Understanding signed with Lufthansa Cargo in 2025, SHEIN has also embarked on additional partnerships with logistics providers, cargo airlines and industry groups to better understand how SAF-related solutions may support efforts to reduce lifecycle emissions in air cargo logistics, the economic feasibility of such efforts, and how associated certification and accounting frameworks operate in practice.
SHEIN is participating in a pilot programme organised by China National Aviation Fuel (CNAF) and the Second Research Institute of Civil Aviation of China (CASRI) aimed at bringing together multiple airline and corporate partners, in order to advance SAF adoption in China.
To complement these initiatives, SHEIN has also joined Green Fuel Forward, a World Economic Forum–led campaign focused on accelerating SAF adoption in the Asia-Pacific region.
While these initiatives represent early-stage pilots, SHEIN recognises that the emissions impact will be modest relative to the company’s overall air transport footprint, based on the fact that only a small proportion of SAF is currently blended into conventional fuel globally."},{"url":"https://www.aircargonews.net/editorial/2026/03/shein-signs-up-for-dhls-gogreen-plus/","title":"SHEIN signs up for DHL’s GoGreen Plus - Air Cargo News","content":"DHL’s GoGreen Plus service enables corporate customers to support the use of SAF by introducing it into the aviation fuel supply used within the network.
In August 2025, SHEIN and Lufthansa Cargo signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to explore a range of initiatives to drive the adoption of sustainable solutions for airfreight, including a programme to scale up the use of SAF on Lufthansa Cargo flights for SHEIN deliveries."},{"url":"https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/shein-saf-deal-puts-dhl-230719403.html","title":"SHEIN SAF Deal Puts DHL GoGreen Plus At Center Of Investor Focus","content":"SHEIN is partnering with Deutsche Post DHL (XTRA:DHL) to use the GoGreen Plus service for air cargo operations.
Check out one of the top narratives in the Simply Wall St Community for Deutsche Post to help decide what it's worth to you.
Simply Wall St has no position in any stocks mentioned."},{"url":"https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/shein-expands-sustainable-aviation-fuel-pilot-initiatives-signs-agreement-with-dhl-for-gogreen-plus-service-302724542.html","title":"SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service","content":"SINGAPORE, March 25, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- SHEIN, a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, has signed an agreement with DHL to adopt its GoGreen Plus service, supporting the use of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) within air cargo logistics.
These programmes are intended to help establish partnerships and operational experience that may support broader adoption of SAF-related solutions over time as industry capacity and participation continue to expand."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Shein sustainable aviation fuel DHL GoGreen Plus partnership agreement","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.dhl.com/id-en/home/press/press-archive/2026/dhl-express-and-shein-sign-gogreen-plus-agreement-to-advance-more-sustainable-logistics-in-cross-border-e-commerce.html","title":"DHL Express and SHEIN Sign GoGreen Plus Agreement to Advance More Sustainable Logistics in Cross-Border E-Commerce - DHL - Indonesia","content":"# DHL Express and SHEIN Sign GoGreen Plus Agreement to Advance More Sustainable Logistics in Cross-Border E-Commerce. DHL Express, a business unit of DHL Group, and SHEIN, a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, today signed a GoGreen Plus agreement at the DHL Group's NOW & NEXT logistics summit in Shanghai. Under the agreement, SHEIN will utilize sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) provided by DHL Express for its international express air freight shipments, aiming to reduce carbon emissions on intercontinental transport routes. DHL Express has long served as one of SHEIN's core carriers in its global logistics network, and the two companies have maintained a strong, strategic partnership over the years. In the air logistics sector, the two parties will collaborate on applications for sustainable aviation fuel (SAF), exploring practical pathways for its use in cross-border e-commerce air transport. \"Partnerships with logistics providers such as DHL Express are an important way for companies like SHEIN to explore how emerging solutions such as sustainable aviation fuel can be incorporated into global logistics networks,” says Mustan Lalani, Head of Sustainability at SHEIN.","score":0.942385,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.aircargonews.net/editorial/2026/03/shein-signs-up-for-dhls-gogreen-plus","title":"SHEIN signs up for DHL’s GoGreen Plus - Air Cargo News","content":"# SHEIN signs up for DHL’s GoGreen Plus. SHEIN and DHL sign GoGreen PLUS agreement. **Online fashion retailer SHEIN has signed an agreement with DHL to adopt its GoGreen Plus service, supporting the use of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF).**. DHL’s GoGreen Plus service enables corporate customers to support the use of SAF by introducing it into the aviation fuel supply used within the network. “Initiatives like this are part of SHEIN’s broader efforts to explore how emerging approaches across the aviation sector may contribute to addressing carbon emissions associated with air transport.”. The agreement with DHL is one of a number of partnerships that SHEIN has undertaken to reduce carbon emissions associated with air transport. In August 2025, SHEIN and Lufthansa Cargo signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to explore a range of initiatives to drive the adoption of sustainable solutions for airfreight, including a programme to scale up the use of SAF on Lufthansa Cargo flights for SHEIN deliveries.","score":0.9374919,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.sheingroup.com/newsroom/shein-expands-sustainable-aviation-fuel-pilot-initiatives-signs-agreement-with-dhl-for-gogreen","title":"SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service | SHEIN Group","content":"###### SHEIN, a global online fashion and lifestyle retailer, has signed an agreement with DHL to adopt its GoGreen Plus service, supporting the use of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) within air cargo logistics. The collaboration forms part of SHEIN’s broader efforts to explore approaches for reducing carbon emissions associated with air transport, while engaging with broader industry initiatives to scale sustainable aviation fuel. SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service SHEIN Expands Sustainable Aviation Fuel Pilot Initiatives, Signs Agreement with DHL for GoGreen Plus Service.","score":0.9345448,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/shein_shein-expands-sustainable-aviation-fuel-pilot-activity-7444749330608996353-voId","title":"SHEIN Partners with DHL on Sustainable Aviation Fuel","content":"SHEIN has signed an agreement with DHL Express to adopt its GoGreen Plus service, supporting the use of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF)","score":0.9263638,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/shein-saf-deal-puts-dhl-230719403.html","title":"SHEIN SAF Deal Puts DHL GoGreen Plus At Center Of Investor Focus","content":"* SHEIN is partnering with Deutsche Post DHL (XTRA:DHL) to use the GoGreen Plus service for air cargo operations. Investors can monitor how DHL reports progress on sustainable aviation fuel usage and related services, as this may influence client relationships, capital allocation decisions, and future regulatory reporting for the group. This agreement with SHEIN puts DHL's GoGreen Plus offering in front of a large, fast-fashion e-commerce customer that relies heavily on air freight.
